title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・背中に学ぶ

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But... I've also learned a lot!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's not just about running without restraint. I have
to run smarter... That's what I learned from
chasing Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna catch up to her... I'll keep getting
stronger and stronger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week makes it through her battle with
Seiun Sky and grows in leaps and bounds.
